instruction_text:
ACME Health Plans — Prior Authorization routing (synthetic)

For commercial PPO members: submit outpatient rehabilitation via the ACME Care Portal.
Portal: https://portal.example-payer.test/auth

Footer (may be outdated): Fax all PT authorizations to 1-800-555-0142.
phone_transcript: Representative: Thanks for calling ACME auth line. Me: For outpatient PT CPT 97110 on PPO Gold, where should we submit? Rep: Use the ACME Care Portal only. Me: Confirm URL https://portal.example-payer.test/auth ? Rep: Yes, that is correct. Me: Read back — portal at https://portal.example-payer.test/auth . Rep: Confirmed.
